title: educabR
text: Read English O educabR dá acesso direto aos principais dados educacionais públicos Brasil — censo escolar e exames nacionais indicadores universitários e financiamento da educação — tudo de dentro R. Sem downloads manuais, sem navegar portais governo: basta escolher o dataset, o ano, e receber uma tabela limpa, pronta para análise. O pacote cobre 14 conjuntos de dados publicados pelo INEP, FNDE, CAPES e STN, abrangendo educação básica, educação superior, pós-graduação e financiamento via FUNDEB.

title: educabR
text: Baixar notas IDEB por município e plotar os 10 melhores estados:
code: library(educabR) library(dplyr) library(ggplot2) library(scales)  ideb <- get_ideb(year = 2023, stage = "anos_iniciais", level = "municipio")  ideb |>   summarise(ideb_medio = mean(vl_observado_2023, na.rm = TRUE), .by = sg_uf) |>   slice_max(ideb_medio, n = 10) |>   ggplot(aes(y = reorder(sg_uf, ideb_medio), x = ideb_medio)) +   geom_col(fill = "#2a9d8f", width = .8) +   labs(title = "Top 10 estados por IDEB 2023", x = NULL, y = "IDEB médio") +   geom_text(     aes(x = ideb_medio, label = number_format(accuracy = .01)(ideb_medio), y = sg_uf),     nudge_x = .2   ) +   theme(     axis.text.x = element_blank(),     axis.ticks.x = element_blank()   )

what: Example analysis: Monthly transfers by source
title: Education Funding: FUNDEB
code: dist <- get_fundeb_distribution(2023, uf = "SP")  # Total monthly transfers by funding source monthly <-    dist |>   group_by(fonte, mes) |>   summarise(total = sum(valor, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")  ggplot(monthly, aes(x = mes, y = total / 1e6, fill = fonte)) +   geom_col() +   labs(     title = "FUNDEB Transfers to Sao Paulo by Source (2023)",     x     = "Month",     y     = "Total (millions R$)",     fill  = "Source"     ) +   theme_minimal() +   theme(legend.position = "bottom")

title: Education Funding: FUNDEB
code: dist <- get_fundeb_distribution(2023)  # Total annual transfers by state by_state <-    dist |>   group_by(uf) |>   summarise(total = sum(valor, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>   arrange(desc(total)) |>   head(10)  ggplot(by_state, aes(x = reorder(uf, total), y = total / 1e9)) +   geom_col(fill = "darkgreen") +   coord_flip() +   labs(     title = "Top 10 States by FUNDEB Transfers (2023)",     x     = NULL,     y     = "Total (billions R$)"     ) +   theme_minimal()

code: mat <- get_fundeb_enrollment(2023, uf = "SP")  # Total enrollment by education type by_type <-    mat |>   group_by(descricao_tipo_educacao) |>   summarise(total = sum(qtd_matricula, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>   arrange(desc(total))  ggplot(by_type, aes(x = reorder(descricao_tipo_educacao, total), y = total / 1e3)) +   geom_col(fill = "coral") +   coord_flip() +   labs(     title = "FUNDEB Enrollment by Education Type - SP (2023)",     x     = NULL,     y     = "Enrollments (thousands)"     ) +   theme_minimal()

what: Example analysis: Urban vs rural enrollment
title: Education Funding: FUNDEB
code: mat <- get_fundeb_enrollment(2023)  # Compare urban vs rural by_location <-    mat |>   group_by(uf, descricao_tipo_localizacao) |>   summarise(total = sum(qtd_matricula, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")  ggplot(by_location, aes(x = uf, y = total / 1e3, fill = descricao_tipo_localizacao)) +   geom_col(position = "dodge") +   labs(     title = "FUNDEB Enrollment: Urban vs Rural by State (2023)",     x     = "State",     y     = "Enrollments (thousands)",     fill  = "Location"     ) +   theme_minimal() +   theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

title: Education Funding: FUNDEB
text: can combine datasets analyze per-student funding across states.
code: # Total transfers by state dist <- get_fundeb_distribution(2023) transfers <-    dist |>   group_by(uf) |>   summarise(total_transfer = sum(valor, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")  # Total enrollment by state mat <- get_fundeb_enrollment(2023) enrollment <-    mat |>   group_by(uf) |>   summarise(total_students = sum(qtd_matricula, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")  # Per-student funding funding <-    inner_join(transfers, enrollment, by = "uf") |>   mutate(per_student = total_transfer / total_students) |>   arrange(desc(per_student))  ggplot(funding, aes(x = reorder(uf, per_student), y = per_student)) +   geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +   coord_flip() +   labs(     title = "FUNDEB Per-Student Funding by State (2023)",     x     = NULL,     y     = "R$ per Student"     ) +   theme_minimal()

title: Higher and Graduate Education: Census, ENADE, IDD, CPC, IGC, and CAPES
text: CPC, IGC, IDD, ENADE closely related. example combine comprehensive view.
code: # Load CPC and IGC for the same year cpc <- get_cpc(2023) igc <- get_igc(2023)  # Compare institution-level quality # IGC gives the overall institution score # CPC gives individual course scores within each institution igc_summary <-    igc |>   filter(!is.na(igc_faixa)) |>   select(codigo_ies, sigla_ies, igc_continuo, igc_faixa)  cpc_summary <-    cpc |>   filter(!is.na(cpc_continuo)) |>   group_by(codigo_ies) |>   summarise(     n_courses = n(),     mean_cpc  = mean(cpc_continuo, na.rm = TRUE),     .groups   = "drop"     )  combined <- inner_join(igc_summary, cpc_summary, by = "codigo_ies")  ggplot(combined, aes(x = mean_cpc, y = igc_continuo, size = n_courses)) +   geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "steelblue") +   labs(     title = "IGC vs Average CPC by Institution (2023)",     x     = "Average CPC (Continuous)",     y     = "IGC (Continuous)",     size  = "Courses Evaluated"     ) +   theme_minimal()

what: Download and Process Brazilian Education Data from INEP
title: Download and Process Brazilian Education Data from INEP
text: Leia em Português educabR gives direct access Brazil’s main public education datasets — school census national exams university indicators education funding — within R. manual downloads, navigating government portals: just pick dataset, choose year, get clean, analysis-ready table. package covers 14 datasets published INEP, FNDE, CAPES, STN, spanning basic education, higher education, graduate programs, FUNDEB funding.

title: Download and Process Brazilian Education Data from INEP
text: Download IDEB scores municipality plot top 10 states:
code: library(educabR) library(dplyr) library(ggplot2) library(scales)  ideb <- get_ideb(year = 2023, stage = "anos_iniciais", level = "municipio")  ideb |>   summarise(ideb_medio = mean(vl_observado_2023, na.rm = TRUE), .by = sg_uf) |>   slice_max(ideb_medio, n = 10) |>   ggplot(aes(y = reorder(sg_uf, ideb_medio), x = ideb_medio)) +   geom_col(fill = "#2a9d8f", width = .8) +   labs(title = "Top 10 states by IDEB 2023", x = NULL, y = "Average IDEB") +   geom_text(     aes(x = ideb_medio, label = number_format(accuracy = .01)(ideb_medio), y = sg_uf),     nudge_x = .2   ) +   theme(     axis.text.x = element_blank(),     axis.ticks.x = element_blank()   )

what: educabR: Download and Process Brazilian Education Data from INEP — educabR-package
title: educabR: Download and Process Brazilian Education Data from INEP — educabR-package
text: Download process public education data INEP (Instituto Nacional de Estudos e Pesquisas Educacionais Anísio Teixeira). Provides functions access microdata School Census (Censo Escolar), ENEM (Exame Nacional Ensino Médio), SAEB (Sistema de Avaliação da Educação Básica), Higher Education Census (Censo da Educação Superior), ENADE (Exame Nacional de Desempenho dos Estudantes), ENCCEJA (Exame Nacional para Certificação de Competências de Jovens e Adultos), IDD (Indicador de Diferença entre os Desempenhos Observado e Esperado), CPC (Conceito Preliminar de Curso), IGC (Índice Geral de Cursos), CAPES graduate education data, FUNDEB (Fundo de Manutencao e Desenvolvimento da Educacao Basica), IDEB (Índice de Desenvolvimento da Educação Básica), educational datasets. Returns data tidy format ready analysis. Data source: INEP Open Data Portal https://www.gov.br/inep/pt-br/acesso--informacao/dados-abertos. educabR package provides functions download process public education data INEP (Instituto Nacional de Estudos e Pesquisas Educacionais Anísio Teixeira). offers easy access microdata : School Census (Censo Escolar): Annual data schools, enrollment, teachers, classes basic education ENEM: Data National High School Exam SAEB: Basic Education Assessment System (student performance) Higher Education Census (Censo da Educação Superior): Annual data institutions, courses, students, faculty higher education ENADE: National Student Performance Exam (higher education) IDD: Value-added indicator undergraduate courses CPC: Preliminary Course Concept (undergraduate quality indicator) IGC: General Index Courses (institutional quality indicator) CAPES: Graduate education data (programs, students, faculty) ENCCEJA: Youth Adult Education Certification Exam IDEB: Basic Education Development Index functions return data tidy format, ready analysis tidyverse tools.

title: Get Higher Education Census (Censo da Educação Superior) data — get_censo_superior
text: year year census (2009-2024). type Type data load. Options: "ies": Higher education institutions (default) "cursos": Undergraduate courses "alunos": Student enrollment "docentes": Faculty/professors uf Optional. Filter state (UF code abbreviation). n_max Maximum number rows read. Default Inf (rows). Consider using smaller value exploration. keep_zip Logical. TRUE, keeps downloaded ZIP file cache. quiet Logical. TRUE, suppresses progress messages.

text: tibble Higher Education Census microdata tidy format.

title: Get Higher Education Census (Censo da Educação Superior) data — get_censo_superior
text: Higher Education Census comprehensive statistical survey higher education institutions (HEIs) Brazil. collects data HEIs offering undergraduate graduate programs. Data types: "ies": One row per institution — administrative data, location, academic organization, funding type. "cursos": One row per undergraduate course — area study, modality (-person/distance), enrollment counts. "alunos": One row per student enrollment — demographics, program, admission type, enrollment status. "docentes": One row per faculty member — education level, employment type, teaching regime. Important notes: Student files ("alunos") can large (several GB). Use n_max read sample first. Column names standardized lowercase underscores. Use uf parameter filter state faster processing.

title: Get FUNDEB distribution data — get_fundeb_distribution
text: year year data (2007-2026). uf Optional. UF code (e.g., "SP", "RJ") filter state. Default NULL (states). source Optional. funding source filter . One : "FPE", "FPM", "IPI", "ITR", "VAAF", "VAAT", "VAAR", "ICMS", "IPVA", "ITCMD". Default NULL (sources). destination Optional. transfer destination. One : "uf": Transfers states Federal District "municipio": Transfers municipalities Default NULL (). n_max Maximum number rows return. Default Inf (rows). keep_file Logical. title: Get FUNDEB distribution data — get_fundeb_distribution
text: tibble tidy (long) format columns: estados State name uf State code (UF) mes_ano Date (last day month) origem Funding source (FPE, FPM, ICMS, etc.) destino Transfer destination ("UF" "Municipio") tabela Table type ("Fundeb" "Ajuste Fundeb") valor Transfer amount BRL (numeric)

title: Get FUNDEB distribution data — get_fundeb_distribution
text: FUNDEB (Fundo de Manutencao e Desenvolvimento da Educacao Basica e de Valorizacao dos Profissionais da Educacao) main funding mechanism basic education Brazil. Excel file STN contains ~20 data sheets named prefix indicating destination (E_ states, M_ municipalities) suffix indicating funding source (e.g., E_FPE, M_ICMS). sheet contains two tables: main FUNDEB transfers FUNDEB adjustment table. Important notes: Data sourced STN (Tesouro Nacional), INEP. Files Excel format (XLS) — requires readxl package. Column names standardized lowercase underscores. Summary sheets (Resumo, Total, etc.) automatically excluded.

title: Get FUNDEB distribution data — get_fundeb_distribution

title: educabR 0.9.0
text: CRAN release: 2026-04-03

title: educabR 0.9.0
text: available_years() now dynamically discovers available years querying data sources (HEAD requests INEP, OData queries FNDE). Results cached per session. Falls back hardcoded list offline. available_years() now accepts "fundeb_enrollment" separate dataset name. Previously, "fundeb" shared distribution enrollment. Code columns (CO_*, CD_*) now read character instead numeric across datasets. prevents loss leading zeros codes like municipality codes, course codes, institution codes.

title: educabR 0.9.0
text: Fixed get_enade() failing 9 19 available years. INEP uses inconsistent URLs ENADE: _LGPD suffix 2012-2019, .rar format 2022. Added hardcoded URL map (enade_urls) 19 correct URLs. Fixed get_fundeb_enrollment() accepting years data FNDE API. API currently data 2017-2018. Fixed encoding warning (“unable translate MARCO”) Windows caused Unicode cedilla FUNDEB month name map. Fixed clear_cache() failing delete files Windows memory-mapped readr. Now deletes entire directories warns locked files. Fixed ZIP extraction fallback triggering ENADE 2017 (“Illegal byte sequence” error matched encoding detection pattern).

title: educabR 0.9.0
text: Added .rar archive extraction support via 7-Zip. find_7z() searches common Windows install paths 7z PATH. Added strip_diacriticals() internal helper encoding-safe text matching. read_inep_file() now auto-detects code columns (CO_*, CD_*) file header reads character. user action required. read_ideb_excel() read_excel_safe() (CPC/IGC) now convert code columns character reading.

what: FUNDEB (Fundo de Manutencao e Desenvolvimento da Educacao Basica)
title: educabR 0.8.0
text: get_fundeb_distribution(): Download FUNDEB resource distribution data (years 2007-2026). Reads sheets STN Excel files returns tidy long-format data monthly transfer amounts state, funding source, destination (states/municipalities), table type (fundeb/adjustment). get_fundeb_enrollment(): Download FUNDEB enrollment data. Fetches FNDE OData API automatic pagination. Results cached CSV. Filtering parameters distribution: uf, source (FPE, FPM, ICMS, etc.), destination (“uf” “municipio”). Data sources: Tesouro Transparente (https://www.tesourotransparente.gov.br) FNDE (https://www.fnde.gov.br).

title: educabR 0.7.0
text: get_capes(): Download CAPES graduate education data (years 2013-2024). Supports 5 data types: programs ("programas"), students ("discentes"), faculty ("docentes"), courses ("cursos"), theses/dissertations catalog ("catalogo"). Uses CKAN API dynamically discover download URLs (CAPES URLs contain UUIDs). Data source: CAPES Open Data Portal (https://dadosabertos.capes.gov.br).

title: educabR 0.6.0
text: get_cpc(): Download CPC data (years 2007-2019, 2021-2023; 2020 edition). Quality indicator undergraduate courses, part SINAES. Files Excel format (xls/xlsx) — requires readxl package. Hardcoded URL map due completely inconsistent INEP naming patterns.

title: educabR 0.6.0
text: get_igc(): Download IGC data (years 2007-2019, 2021-2023; 2020 edition). Institutional quality indicator based weighted CPC averages CAPES scores. Files Excel format (xls/xlsx), except 2007 7z archive. Hardcoded URL map due completely inconsistent INEP naming patterns.

title: educabR 0.6.0

what: SAEB (Sistema de Avaliação da Educação Básica)

Supports multiple data types: student results ("aluno"), school ("escola"), principal ("diretor"), teacher ("professor") questionnaires. title: educabR 0.2.0
text: Fixed encoding detection Windows using iconv() instead validEnc(). Fixed "Latin-1" encoding name "latin1" Windows codepage compatibility. Fixed ENEM 2024+ support: new type parameter split files ("participantes", "resultados"). Added SAS datetime parsing Censo Escolar date columns (dt_*). Converted IDEB vl_* columns character numeric, handling "-", "ND", comma decimals.
